hyperedges.label: ZeroSeams Three-Panel UI Layout (Toolbar + LayerPanel + PropertiesPanel)
Shared UI Primitives (Tooltip + iconBtnStyle used by Toolbar and PropertiesPanel)
Playwright Electron E2E Test Suite (all test scripts)
Canvas Object Type Hierarchy (BaseCanvasObject + all subtypes + union)
Snap System: useSnapGuides + SnapGuides component + CarouselStage integration
Autosave Pipeline: useAutosave + useSaveStatusStore + electronAPI
Canvas Node Types share Snap Guides system
Electron IPC bridge: preload exposes electronAPI; useExternalEdit + useKeyboardShortcuts + downloadFrames call it
AI Background Removal: AIProvider wraps useBackgroundRemoval which calls useCanvasStore
IPC Project Save Pipeline (save/save-as/save-copy/autosave → addRecentFile → recentFiles.json)
External Edit Lifecycle (edit-in-external-app, chokidar watcher, external-image-changed push)
Agent Domain Isolation System (ui/canvas/ai engineers + qa-reviewer + store boundary)

nodes.label: Save Split-Button Pattern (Save / Save As / Save a Copy)

nodes.label: rotateAroundCenter: Konva Rect/Text rotate around top-left not center; ellipse exempt
nodes.norm_label: rotatearoundcenter: konva rect/text rotate around top-left not center; ellipse exempt

nodes.label: Rationale: Two-Layer Model (never collapse frame vs content)
nodes.norm_label: rationale: two-layer model (never collapse frame vs content)

nodes.label: Rationale: Gamma-correct exposure (matches Lightroom, no harsh clipping)
nodes.norm_label: rationale: gamma-correct exposure (matches lightroom, no harsh clipping)

nodes.label: Rationale: LUT cache keyed by param:value, rebuilt only on change
nodes.norm_label: rationale: lut cache keyed by param:value, rebuilt only on change

nodes.label: Frame Labels (HTML div, not Konva Text)
nodes.norm_label: frame labels (html div, not konva text)

nodes.label: Rationale: Frame labels as HTML div (not Konva Text)
nodes.norm_label: rationale: frame labels as html div (not konva text)

nodes.label: Rationale: keepRatio auto=proportional default (Shift=free); advanced=free default (Shift=proportional)
nodes.norm_label: rationale: keepratio auto=proportional default (shift=free); advanced=free default (shift=proportional)

nodes.label: Rationale: Store uses top-left (x,y) for all shapes; convert to center at render for Konva Ellipse
nodes.norm_label: rationale: store uses top-left (x,y) for all shapes; convert to center at render for konva ellipse

nodes.label: Upcoming: AI background removal, SAM, LaMa
